origin.label: Stratford, ON
origin.note: Stratford City Hall — used as the origin for distance calculations.

formula.description: Travel fee is calculated on round-trip distance beyond the free zone. Free zone is Stratford + 5km radius (so 10km free round-trip).
formula.pseudocode: billable_round_trip_km = max(0, (one_way_km * 2) - (free_zone_km * 2)); fee = max(minimum_travel_fee_cad, billable_round_trip_km * per_km_rate_round_trip_cad); if one_way_km > 30 -> route to owner for case-by-case approval; if one_way_km > 45 -> auto-decline politely.
